meta.notes: Formal benchmark run used python3.11 directly with PYTHONPATH pointed at /home/ec2-user/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills and PIKABOT_STATE_DIR=/tmp so the skill could persist JSON output in a writable location. Pre-flight confirmed ffmpeg and yt-dlp were installed. GOOGLE_API_KEY was absent from ~/keys/.env, but this skill's Gemini and LLM traffic went through the Pika proxy and the run completed successfully without a direct Google key. Token usage was derived from rollout token_count deltas between the benchmark wall-start and wall-end timestamps rather than the extractor's latest cumulative total.

task.name: viral-trend-finder
task.purpose: Benchmark the local viral-trend-finder skill across niche search, X search, full video analysis, and general trending discovery, including the heavy T3 pipeline of metadata, download, frame extraction, Gemini vision, and LLM synthesis.
task.expected_output: Trend search JSON for T1/T2/T4 plus a full storyboard/script analysis JSON for T3.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally under /home/ec2-user/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills/viral-trend-finder/.

asset_acquisition.notes: No standalone asset acquisition phase. Video download happened inside T3 analyze and is recorded in execution step notes.

steps.name: t3_analyze
steps.notes: exit=0 source_url=https://www.instagram.com/p/DW6T0PKDLuQ/ metadata_s=1.13 download_s=11.74 frame_extract_s=5.59 gemini_vision_s=20.26 llm_synthesis_s=212.98 title='Instant Back Burn' target_niche='fitness enthusiasts and busy moms' format=tutorial success_factors=6 script_segments=10 storyboard_shots=10. Download path used Instagram Apify CDN fallback after yt-dlp failure. Runtime anomalies: 1/20 Gemini frame analyses failed; Anthropic synthesis timed out twice then fell back to OpenAI. Saved skill report: /tmp/viral-trend-finder/2026-04-10-fitness-enthusiasts-and-busy-moms.json.

steps.name: t4_trending
steps.notes: exit=0 results=10 top_platform=tiktok top_views=32400000 top_url=https://www.tiktok.com/@effectik11/video/7287696643720236320. TikTok native trending returned 0 and the skill fell back to keyword searches across dance,lifestyle,comedy,food,fitness plus Instagram/X evergreen category searches.

execution.notes: Execution total is the sum of the four individually timed skill commands. T3 sub-stage durations came from the skill's own stderr timing lines rather than external inference.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only. Benchmark artifacts were written to the runs directory, and the skill's saved analysis output remained on disk under /tmp/viral-trend-finder/.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-codex-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. All 8 skills ran in a single Codex session with monotonically increasing token counts.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
